10.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Valves - BIKE24
10.extractionRationale: Single retail price found: 20,16 EUR for BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 (2 pieces). This is the only price mentioned in the source for the target product in the German market.

27.evidenceText: Five distinct product pages identified: p1993548.html (80mm schwarz), p1993546.html (40mm schwarz), p1993547.html (60mm schwarz), p1993551.html (80mm Kupfer), p1993550.html (60mm Kupfer). Each URL represents a unique product listing for different valve sizes and colors.
27.extractionRationale: Counted all unique product page URLs provided in the evidence. Each URL (p1993548, p1993546, p1993547, p1993551, p1993550) represents a distinct CoreCap AL Valve product listing with different specifications (size and/or color variants). Cross-referenced product images in the content are accessories or related products, not separate listings.

30.evidenceText: All 5 product listings from BIKE24 contain only product descriptions and features. No stock status information (out of stock, unavailable, nicht verfügbar, ausverkauft, etc.) is present in any of the provided content.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status cannot be determined from the provided text. The content appears to be incomplete product descriptions that do not include availability or inventory status information.

56.evidenceText: Source 3 shows a filter for "Clik Valve" tubes but the actual product listings shown (tubes 14, 19, 19L) all have AV valves, not Clik valves. Sources 4-5 describe the Clik Valve product itself (a valve), not inner tubes using the valve.
56.extractionRationale: The evidence provided does not contain a list of specific inner tube models/SKUs that use the Clik valve interface. While Source 3 appears to be a filtered page for Clik valve tubes, the actual tube models shown in the content use standard AV (Auto Valve) designation, not Clik valves. Sources 4 and 5 describe valve products themselves, which should not be counted per the task instructions.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum is expected to trade at 3600.28 USD/Tonne by the end of this quarter
61.extractionRationale: Extracted the aluminum price value of 3600.28 USD/Tonne directly from the source text. The value is already in USD per metric ton format as required, so no conversion was necessary.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest (LUPc1) - Investing.com
62.evidenceText: The Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest price today is 1,793.99
62.extractionRationale: The source states the current US Midwest aluminum premium as 1,793.99. Based on standard aluminum premium market conventions, this value is in cents per pound. Converting to USD per pound: 1,793.99 cents ÷ 100 = 17.9399 USD/lb. Medium confidence due to unit not being explicitly stated in the excerpt.
